result: I don’t have wants or preferences the way a person does. I’m a large language model created by MiniMax, and my training is focused on understanding and generating text to the best of my ability. My “goal,” if you can call it that, is to provide coherent, relevant, and helpful responses—because that’s what I was designed to do. I don’t experience desire, hunger, or personal ambitions; I simply process your prompts and try to answer them based on the patterns I learned during training.
